attributes.action: To avoid UK bankruptcy, stop immigration if no tangible benefit exists.
attributes.additional_details: We hear that our national debt is becoming unserviceable. The government's priority over everything is long term security of our entire nation. There will always be inequity within the nation but national altruism can only exist whilst a surplus of UK resources exists. Milk those who generate the abundance too far and the majority will fall into need. If we cannot look after our own, unproductive foreigners must be banned. Britain is a vessel of limited capacity. Government alone protects us.
attributes.background: Make it unlawful for immigrants and their extended families to enter the UK unless they can prove in advance that their presence will benefit the UK economy.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.
We're not sure exactly what requirements you would like to introduce. 

The Government already publishes guidance on the Skilled Worker visa: eligible occupations and codes are available here: https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/skilled-worker-visa-eligible-occupations/skilled-worker-visa-eligible-occupations-and-codes
